chemaxon.marvin.view

Interface MDocStorage.Listener

  • Enclosing class:
    MDocStorage

    public static interface MDocStorage.Listener
    Document production listener.

      • docProduced

        void docProduced(MDocStorage ds,
               MDocument doc,
               int k)
        Document retrieved from source.

        ds - the storage object
        doc - the document
        k - the record index

        void storageSizeChanged(MDocStorage ds,
                      int oldsz,
                      int newsz)
        Storage size changed.

        oldsz - old size
        newsz - new size

      • storageSizeFinalized
